title: Vanish Gold Oxi Action Upholstery & Carpet Cleaner, Stain Remover Spray, 500 ml | 30 Second Amazing Stain Removal | Removes Pet Messes 1st Time | Prevents Pet Remarking | Spot Cleaning
features: 3 in 1 Targeted Action for spot cleaning, perfect for carpets, sofas and rugs: our powerful formula removes stains from deep within carpets and upholstery
Amazing stain removal in just 30 seconds, on common stains such as wine, coffee, tea, soil and pet urine
Cleans Pet Messes First Time: From dog food to urine, our carpet stain remover spray cleans pet messes 1st time, and helps prevent pet remarking
How to use: Remove excess dirt, spray on stain and leave for a maximum of 5 minutes. Lastly, blot the stain and remove excess product using a clean cloth
Safe to use on different carpet and upholstery colours & fabrics
description: Product Description Vanish Gold Oxi Action Carpet Cleaner and Stain Remover Spray is the perfect solution to target stains on carpets & upholstery. Its fast acting formula removes stains from deep within carpets and upholstery, in as little as 30 seconds. Cleans pet messes first time, acting against a variety of stains such as dog food, pet urine and soil, while preventing pet remarking. How to use: 1) Remove excess dirt and open nozzle. 2) Spray on stain and leave for a maximum of 5 minutes. 3) Blot the stain and remove excess product using a clean cloth. Safe to use on different carpet and upholstery colours & fabrics* *If in doubt, test on a small, inconspicuous area before full application. Always follow the instructions on the back of the packaging. For newer looking carpets and upholstery, use the Vanish Gold Oxi Action Carpet Cleaner and Stain Remover Spray in combination with the Vanish Carpet Deep Clean Gold Foam and Gold Powder for amazing cleaning results. Ingredients Contains <5%: Oxygen-Based Bleaching Agent, Anionic Surfactants, Nonionic Surfactants, Polycarboxylates, Perfume, Limonene, Hexyl Cinnamal, Citral, Benzyl Salicylate Safety Warning Safety Warning DO NOT USE on "velvet" materials, brocade, or those unsuitable for wet cleaning. Not suitable for silk and oriental rugs. Safety Information Keep out of the reach of children and pets. Do not get in eyes. If product gets in to eyes, rinse with plenty of water. Do not ingest. If swallowed get medical attention. Do not breath spray. Wash hands after use. For sensitive skin, the use of gloves is recommended. Do not mix with other products. Box Contains 1 x Vanish Gold Carpet Stain Remover Spray 500ml Manufacturer Contact Information Wellcroft House Wellcroft Road Slough Sl1 4Aq See more
